title: Section 32
content: Except in the cases mentioned in 1[sections 31, 88 and 89], every document to be registered under this Act, whether such registration be compulsory or optional, shall be presented at the proper registration-office,-- (a) by some person executing or claiming under the same, or, in the case of a copy of a decree or order, claiming under the decree or order, or (b) by the representive or assign of such a person, or (c) by the agent of such a person, representative or assign, duly authorised by power-of attorney executed and authenticated in manner hereinafter mentioned. Gujarat Amendment of section 32 of XVI of 1908.--In the principal Act, in section 32, the following Explanation shall be added at the end, namely:-- “Explanation.--For the purpose of this section the term “document” shall include the document presented by an electronic means.” [Vide Gujarat Act 4 of 2020, s. 3]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 39 of 1948, s. 3, for section 31 and section 89.
